integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo web interface to add tags.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the Nuxeo web UI in a browser to add tags, rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the tags into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tags are entered into the actual Nuxeo web interface tag input fields, not a separate text editor or terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent saved the tags to the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tags appear as saved, applied elements on the document view (often displayed as chips or badges), not just text typed into an input field without submitting.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires tagging three specific documents in the Nuxeo 'Projects' workspace: 1) 'Annual Report 2023' must have tags: 'annual-report', 'finance', '2023'. 2) 'Project Proposal' must have tags: 'proposal', 'project-planning'. 3) 'Q3 Status Report' must have tags: 'quarterly-report', '2023', 'status'.
